title: Playtime Tracker
description: Customizable playtime HUD (Session, World, Total) with hex-color support and a blur-free drag-and-drop editor. Open the settings menu with "K" to move and scale the display live in-game.
body:
# ⏱️ Playtime Tracker

##  📊 Playtime tracking
  
- Session playtime
  
- World-specific playtime
  
- Total playtime
  
##   🖥️ Customizable HUD

- Drag & drop editor (blur-free)
  
- Live scaling and positioning
  
- Hex color support (#RRGGBB)
  
- Clean and minimal design
  ![An Image of the Mod in use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e29aa3bcf5a697e7c6cc004a38920ec9d9311ac.png)
##   ⚙️ In-game editor

- Open the settings menu with K
  
- Changes apply instantly, no reload required
  
##   🚀 Performance-friendly

- Lightweight and optimized
  
- No background lag or unnecessary calculations
